name: gemini-cli-calmui
description: Gemini CLI chat interface for VS Code

calmui.geminiPath.description: Absolute path to the gemini CLI binary. Leave as 'gemini' to resolve from PATH.

calmui.useVertexAI.description: Run Gemini CLI against Vertex AI. When enabled, sets GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_VERTEXAI=true and strips GEMINI_API_KEY / GOOGLE_API_KEY from the spawn environment so inherited public API keys do not override Vertex auth.

calmui.googleCloudProject.description: Google Cloud project ID to use for Vertex AI. Leave empty to inherit GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT from the environment or gcloud defaults.

calmui.includeDirectories.description: Extra folders outside the workspace that Gemini CLI can read. Passed as --include-directories on every spawn. Use absolute paths (e.g. C:\AI_LAB or /Users/you/shared).

calmui.useAcp.description: Use the Gemini CLI ACP transport for persistent sessions, image input, permission prompts, model discovery, and recovery. Disable only to fall back to legacy per-turn stream-json spawns.

calmui.attachMcpServersToAcp.description: Experimental. Attach configured MCP servers to Gemini ACP sessions. Leave disabled if session creation hangs or prompts time out.
